demographic_context.districts_used: SHIMLA→Shimla; HAMIRPUR→Hamirpur; SIRMOUR→Sirmaur; SOLAN→Solan; UNA→Una; BILASPUR→Bilaspur; KANGRA→Kangra; CHAMBA→Chamba; MANDI→Mandi

existing_analysis.generated_baseline_summary: HAMIRPUR was retained by BJP in 2024. BJP vote share changed by -11.1 points and INC vote share changed by +11.9 points compared with 2019. The 2024 margin was 17.4%. This is a descriptive election profile, not a causal explanation.
existing_analysis.generated_electoral_movement: Available data indicates HAMIRPUR was retained by BJP in 2024. BJP vote share changed by -11.1 percentage points versus 2019. INC vote share changed by +11.9 percentage points versus 2019. The winning margin moved from 40.4% in 2019 to 17.4% in 2024. Turnout changed by -8.4 percentage points between 2019 and 2024. This section describes observed election movement only and is not a causal explanation.
existing_analysis.generated_demographic_context: Available NFHS-linked indicators may suggest a relatively rural-linked profile (urban share about 8.7%). Electricity/Lpg/Mobile Phone/Bank Account access indicators are available for this seat. Available data indicates relatively high district-linked demographic coverage for this seat.
existing_analysis.generated_district_context: District mapping uses: SHIMLA→Shimla; HAMIRPUR→Hamirpur; SIRMOUR→Sirmaur; SOLAN→Solan; UNA→Una; BILASPUR→Bilaspur; KANGRA→Kangra; CHAMBA→Chamba; MANDI→Mandi. NFHS-5 coverage share is about 100.0%. Change-indicator coverage share is about 100.0%. Change quality flag: low.
existing_analysis.generated_what_to_watch: Large major-party vote-share movement may warrant closer review of local competition patterns. Turnout shifted materially between 2019 and 2024 and may be worth tracking.
existing_analysis.final_summary: HAMIRPUR was retained by BJP in 2024. BJP vote share changed by -11.1 points and INC vote share changed by +11.9 points compared with 2019. The 2024 margin was 17.4%. This is a descriptive election profile, not a causal explanation.
existing_analysis.final_electoral_movement: Available data indicates HAMIRPUR was retained by BJP in 2024. BJP vote share changed by -11.1 percentage points versus 2019. INC vote share changed by +11.9 percentage points versus 2019. The winning margin moved from 40.4% in 2019 to 17.4% in 2024. Turnout changed by -8.4 percentage points between 2019 and 2024. This section describes observed election movement only and is not a causal explanation.
existing_analysis.final_what_to_watch: Large major-party vote-share movement may warrant closer review of local competition patterns. Turnout shifted materially between 2019 and 2024 and may be worth tracking.

writing_prompts.what_happened_prompt: Describe observed 2019→2024 election movement for HAMIRPUR, Himachal Pradesh using winner, vote-share, margin, and turnout fields only.
writing_prompts.why_it_mattered_prompt: Explain why HAMIRPUR may be analytically useful using priority reason (none), contest closeness, swings, and state context.
writing_prompts.factors_prompt: List only cautious factors such as candidate profile, alliance arithmetic, state-level swing, turnout movement, or limited demographic coverage.
writing_prompts.demographic_prompt: Summarise available NFHS-linked indicators and district mapping. If unavailable, state that the profile remains election-only.
writing_prompts.what_to_watch_prompt: Use forward-looking but non-predictive language about seat stability, swing consolidation, and coverage improvements.
writing_prompts.caveat_prompt: State that local causal explanations require further source review.
